rag_rules: Place AGREE annex blocks in component type scopes for port-level assumptions and guarantees, and in implementation scopes for bindings after subcomponents and connections.
Use visible feature names and concrete bounds in AGREE contracts; avoid subcomponent ports in type-level contracts.
generic_rules: Ensure AGREE annex blocks are placed in valid AADL scopes: component types for assumptions/guarantees, implementations for bindings.
When defining range checks in AGREE, use visible identifiers and explicit type matching for expressions.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must use valid AADL scoping rules; annex blocks in implementations should follow subcomponent and connection declarations.
Use const declarations for thresholds and eq for boolean expressions in AGREE contracts.
anti_patterns: Do not place implementation-level bindings in component type scopes or use subcomponent ports in type contracts without proper variable representation.
